linkedin.content: Protecting pharma profitability in a high-access world requires clinical precision in finance. Gross-to-Net (GTN) isn't just a subtraction—it's a strategic calculation. #GTN #PharmaFinance #Strategy

linkedin.role: Managing Director at Baker Tilly US
linkedin.content: Great discussion last week on commercial launch readiness. One key takeaway: The finance team must be the 'Navigator'—not just tracking spend, but charting the course to launch success. #LifeSciences #CFO #ExecutiveLeadership
